_comment: Odoo 19 differentiation from odoo-17 base: Python 3.11+ minimum (3.12 recommended per upstream), controller @http.route(type='jsonrpc') renamed from type='json', Domain class + 'any!' operator, declarative _constraints/_indexes class attributes, first-class AI server actions. Reuses odoo-17 rule pack — see templates/cursor/skills/odoo/odoo-code-patterns/references/odoo-19-patterns.md for full delta list.
description: Odoo 19 Community / Enterprise — Python 3.11+, OWL, type='jsonrpc' route, Domain API, declarative _constraints. Reuses odoo-17 rule pack — see odoo-19-patterns.md for deltas.

stack._doc: Per-stack optional path overrides — used by realdata_test MCP. Leave empty to let user set <PREFIX>_ODOO_BIN / <PREFIX>_ODOO_CONF env vars at runtime.

_rules_comment: TODO: differentiate from odoo-17 base when templates/cursor/rules/odoo-19/ is authored. v19 deltas (jsonrpc route, Domain API, declarative constraints) covered in skill references only.
_overlay_doc: Version-specific invariants merged on top of project invariants.json by a FUTURE installer step (setup.py --merge-invariants, not yet wired — Wave C). Inherits the odoo-17 + odoo-18 overlays conceptually, plus the v19 deltas below. Same schema as .agent-toolkit/invariants.json entries. severity=warn. Cite a confirmed Odoo release fact per entry.

invariants_overlay.description: Odoo 19 renamed controller route type='json' to type='jsonrpc' (type='json2' is a separate new contract).
invariants_overlay.rationale: v19 renamed @http.route(type='json') to type='jsonrpc' (odoo-19-patterns.md). A leftover type='json' no longer matches the JSON-RPC dispatcher. Fix when violated: restore the type='jsonrpc' (or intended type='json2'/'http') the edit dropped.

invariants_overlay.description: Odoo 19 ships the Domain class + 'any!' operator for non-trivial domain construction.
invariants_overlay.rationale: v19 formalizes domain construction via the Domain class (with the strict 'any!' operator) (odoo-19-patterns.md). Code built around Domain(...) must keep the import + usage intact. Fix when violated: restore the Domain import/usage the edit dropped.

invariants_overlay.description: Odoo 19 supports declarative _constraints / _indexes class attributes (preferred over the legacy _sql_constraints attribute).
invariants_overlay.rationale: v19 adds declarative _constraints / _indexes class attributes as the preferred form (odoo-19-patterns.md); _sql_constraints still works but is legacy. Fix when violated: restore the _constraints/_indexes (or _sql_constraints) declaration the edit dropped.
